message:
feat(abi): add direct ELF-based pthread symbol resolution from loaded libc.so.6

Introduce loaded_libc_base_and_path() and resolve_loaded_libc_symbol_direct()
to locate pthread symbols by parsing /proc/self/maps and walking the ELF
symbol table of the already-loaded libc.so.6. This provides a more robust
resolution path that works before dlsym is fully initialized, falling back
to the existing dlsym mechanism when ELF lookup fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
